text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe modified 'Internet Settings\\Connections' registry key and then made 12 rapid connections to local port 5985 (WinRM) within a single second. This combination and rapid connection rate is unusual for a typical svchost.exe process.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections",
    "5985",
    "rapid connections",
    "WinRM"
  ]
}
